data.title: KOSPI Index Surges 7% in a Single Day
data.description: On April 8, the KOSPI index in South Korea experienced a significant increase, rising by 7% within the day. According to BlockBeats, the index is currently reported at 5882.91 points. This substantial growth highlights a notable shift in the market dynamics.

data.title: USD/CHF Experiences 1% Decline
data.description: The USD/CHF currency pair has seen a 1% drop in its value today, currently trading at 0.7896. According to ChainCatcher, this decline reflects fluctuations in the foreign exchange market. The movement in the USD/CHF rate is being closely monitored by traders and analysts, as it may impact international trade and investment strategies.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Announces Plans to Address Hormuz Strait Shipping Congestion
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump announced on April 8 that the United States will assist in resolving the shipping congestion issue in the Hormuz Strait. According to Jin10, Trump stated that there will be numerous positive actions and significant wealth creation. He mentioned on social media that Iran can begin its reconstruction process, and the U.S. will ship various materials and 'stay there' to ensure everything proceeds smoothly. Trump also claimed this would mark a 'golden era for the Middle East.'

U.S. media reported on April 7 that Iran and Oman plan to charge a transit fee for the Hormuz Strait. However, this information has not yet been confirmed by Iranian officials.

data.title: CZ: He proactively went to the US to plead guilty in an effort to minimize the impact on Binance users and the overall crypto industry.
data.description: In his new book, *Binance Life*, CZ stated that in 2023 he voluntarily traveled to the United States and admitted to violating relevant provisions of the U.S. Bank Secrecy Act, primarily concerning Binance's early provision of services to U.S. users without proper registration. CZ stated that given the increasingly stringent regulatory environment at the time, failing to make this decision could have brought greater uncertainty and potential impact to Binance's operations, BNB holders, and the industry's development. CZ indicated that he chose to address the risk by personally assuming legal responsibility in order to reduce the impact on platform users and the overall crypto industry, and to ensure the continued operation of the business.

data.title: Major Losses Recorded on Hyperliquid Platform Amid BTC Holdings
data.description:
On April 8, significant losses were reported on the Hyperliquid platform, according to BlockBeats. Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that the largest BTC holdings on the platform are associated with two addresses, 'pension-usdt.eth' and 'Strategy 对手盘,' both of which opened short positions earlier this month. Today, these addresses recorded losses of $4.92 million and $4.62 million, respectively, making them the top two daily losers on the platform.

The 'pension-usdt.eth' address also topped the weekly loss chart. Its holdings include a 3x BTC short position valued at $71.29 million with an average price of $67,992, resulting in a floating loss of $3.28 million. Additionally, it holds a 3x ETH long position valued at $44.76 million with an average price of $2,131, incurring a floating loss of $2.11 million.

The 'Strategy 对手盘' address holds a 40x BTC short position valued at $75.86 million with an average price of $69,036, leading to a floating loss of $2.44 million. This address is currently the largest BTC short holder on the platform.

The addresses involved are 0x0ddf9bae2af4b874b96d287a5ad42eb47138a902 and 0x94d3735543ecb3d339064151118644501c933814.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $64.6704 million yesterday, with Fidelity's FETH ETF experiencing the largest net outflow at $48.2093 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $64.6704 million yesterday (April 7th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net outflow of $48.2093 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.283 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a single-day net outflow of $16.4611 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $11.607 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $11.979 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.69%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.536 billion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump: A New Era of Peace in the Middle East
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on April 8 that the world is witnessing a significant day for peace. According to Jin10, Trump stated that Iran is also eager for peace, having endured enough conflict, and other parties share this sentiment. The United States will assist in resolving the congestion of ships in the Strait of Hormuz, promising numerous positive actions and substantial financial gains. Iran can begin its reconstruction process, and the U.S. plans to load various supplies and remain on standby to ensure smooth operations. Trump expressed confidence that everything will proceed successfully, suggesting that this could be a golden era for the Middle East, akin to experiences in the United States.

data.title: Trump Declares Complete Victory in U.S. Negotiations
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently stated that the United States has achieved a 'complete and total victory' in its negotiations, according to BlockBeats. He emphasized that there is a solid framework for a long-term agreement, consisting of 15 points, most of which have been agreed upon. Trump mentioned that any peace agreement would address nuclear material issues. He expressed optimism about the potential success of the agreement, saying, 'Let's wait and see if it can be achieved.' However, he declined to comment on whether he would reinstate his initial threats to destroy Iran's civilian power plants and bridges if the agreement falls through.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Discusses Framework for Long-Term Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced today that a solid framework for a long-term agreement is already established, including a 15-point plan. According to NS3.AI, Trump stated that consensus has been achieved on most provisions, emphasizing that any peace deal must address the issue of nuclear materials. Despite these developments, Trump cautioned that a final agreement may still not be reached.

data.title: Binance to Suspend Polygon Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting at approximately 2026-04-08 13:00 (UTC), the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Polygon (POL) network. This suspension is to facilitate a network upgrade and hard fork, aimed at enhancing user experience. The upgrade is scheduled to occur at block height 85,268,500, or around 2026-04-08 14:00 (UTC).

The trading of tokens on the Polygon network will remain unaffected during this period. Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the upgrade. Once the network is deemed stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. No additional announcements will be made regarding the reopening. Users are encouraged to stay informed through the project team's updates.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $159 million yesterday, with Fidelity FBTC experiencing the largest net outflow at $47.8457 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $159 million yesterday (April 7th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Valkyrie ETF BRRR, with a net inflow of $2.3227 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $339 million. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of $47.8457 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.06 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $88.706 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.39%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $56.27 billion.

data.title: Investor Recovers from Liquidation with Strategic Moves
data.description:
An investor faced a significant liquidation event on March 26, leaving their account with approximately $90,000. According to ChainCatcher, the investor subsequently deposited $700,000 into Hyperliquid to replenish funds and initiate a new long position.

The investor's current holdings include 10,875 ETH, valued at $24.29 million, with an unrealized profit exceeding $1 million. The liquidation price for this position is set at $2,061.19.

data.title: ZEC Experiences Significant Surge in Value
data.description: ZEC has seen a notable increase in its value, reaching 328.15 USDT briefly before settling at 322 USDT. According to Foresight News, this marks a 26.41% rise over the past 24 hours.

data.title: BIT: Bitcoin leverage clearing out, market enters a phase of directional choice.
data.description: Bitcoin futures open interest has decreased from approximately $42 billion in October 2025 to approximately $21 billion currently, indicating a significant deleveraging process in the market. Meanwhile, funding rates have recently fluctuated sharply between -12% and +7%, no longer maintaining their previous long-term positive levels, reflecting a rapid shift in bullish and bearish forces. Analysts point out that current market leverage is low, meaning even small inflows of funds can amplify their impact on prices. Furthermore, there have been no large-scale liquidations recently; the most recent concentrated liquidation occurred in early February, and the current position structure is relatively stable. In the short term, Bitcoin has not yet formed a clear trend, and the market is highly sensitive to fund flows and changes in macroeconomic events.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic Launches Project Glasswing to Enhance Software Security
data.description:
Anthropic has announced the launch of 'Project Glasswing,' an initiative aimed at safeguarding critical software security worldwide. According to Foresight News, the project is powered by Anthropic's latest model, Claude Mythos Preview, which excels in identifying software vulnerabilities, surpassing most human experts and second only to top-tier technicians.

Anthropic has partnered with major companies including Amazon Web Services, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorgan Chase, the Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Palo Alto Networks. Together, they will utilize Mythos Preview to assist in detecting and rectifying system flaws. The model has already identified thousands of high-risk vulnerabilities, including some within major operating systems and web browsers.

data.title: New Zealand Reserve Bank Governor Comments on Inflation Forecasts Amid Oil Price Fluctuations
data.description: New Zealand Reserve Bank Governor, Adrian Orr, has expressed concerns regarding the country's inflation forecasts in light of recent oil price movements. According to Jin10, Orr stated that if oil prices continue to decline, the current inflation predictions may prove to be overestimated. This statement highlights the potential impact of global commodity prices on New Zealand's economic outlook and the Reserve Bank's monetary policy decisions. Orr's comments come as central banks worldwide monitor inflationary pressures and adjust their strategies accordingly.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Lead in Social Dominance and AI Search Volume
data.description: Bitcoin has emerged as the leader in social dominance, capturing 32.9% of the market, according to NS3.AI. Meanwhile, Ethereum has taken the lead in AI search volume with a 12% share. Ethereum also ranks second in social dominance with 11.65%, while the Solana Foundation holds the second position in AI search volume at 10%.

data.title: Bitcoin Leads Crypto Futures Liquidations with $245.70 Million in 24 Hours
data.description: Bitcoin has led the estimated crypto perpetual futures liquidations over the past 24 hours, totaling $245.70 million. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum followed with liquidations amounting to $124.87 million, while Solana recorded $19.58 million. These figures highlight significant activity in the crypto futures market, reflecting ongoing volatility and investor caution.

data.title: New Zealand Reserve Bank Governor: No Strong Advocates for Rate Hikes Today
data.description: New Zealand Reserve Bank Governor Adrian Orr stated that there are no strong advocates for interest rate hikes today. According to Jin10, Orr emphasized the current economic conditions and monetary policy stance, suggesting that the central bank is not inclined towards increasing rates at this time. This comes amid ongoing discussions about the country's economic outlook and inflationary pressures. Orr's comments reflect a cautious approach to monetary policy, considering the balance between supporting economic growth and managing inflation.

data.title: Blockchain Wallet Utilizes TWAP for SKY Acquisition
data.description: A blockchain-based multi-signature wallet is actively purchasing SKY tokens using CoW Swap's time-weighted average price (TWAP) feature. According to Foresight News, the wallet initiated the acquisition plan two months ago by transferring 5 million USDC from a wallet starting with 0x3d4 to another starting with 0x18e. The strategy involves buying SKY tokens every hour with 1,252 USDC. So far, half of the plan has been executed, with 2.431 million USDC already spent.
